sourcesContent:
import React from 'react' import {Card,CardBody} from 'reactstrap'; import {Link} from 'react-router-dom'; import calculateAvgRating from "../utils/avgrating" import './tour-card.css' const TourCard = ({tour}) => { const {_id, title, city, photo, price, featured, reviews}= tour const { totalRating, avgRating }=calculateAvgRating(reviews) console.log(tour) return (
{ featured && Featured}
{city} {avgRating === 0 ? null :avgRating} {totalRating === 0 ?( 'Not rated' ) :( ({reviews.length}) ) }
{title}
${price} /per person
) } export default TourCard
